case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. vs. ROGERS, DARRELL et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER RELEASE FROM STAY AND FOR JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $3.46 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, DARRELL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, DARRELL

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, DARRELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 216 EDDY ST #315 $443.38 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $443.38, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
